jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at 1mg
jsonLd.description:
1mg invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About 1mg:
1mg is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg!
